scope: Anti-CSRF and Request Security Validation Flow
interaction_flow: Backend: eggspress routes request through auth2_middleware (auth2: true)
AuthService → auth2_middleware: returns Actor (sets req.user, req.actor)
route_handler: if subdomain is 'api' → res.status(404).send('Hey, stop that!') [ABORT]
Backend_AntiCSRFService: if no queue → new CircularQueue(10); map_session_to_tokens[uuid] = queue
=== FLOW 2: CSRF Token Validation on Protected Endpoint ===
eggspress_router: run middleware chain (auth2 → anticsrf → handler)
anticsrf_middleware: if valid → next() → route handler executes
validate_signature_auth: parse URL searchParams → uid, expires, signature
validate_signature_auth: throw if uid missing | action missing | expires missing | signature missing
validate_signature_auth: if options.uid provided && uid !== options.uid → throw 'uid does not match'
validate_signature_auth: check expires < Date.now()/1000 → if expired throw 'Signature expired'
validate_signature_auth: if signature === expected_write → return true (write allows all actions)
validate_signature_auth: if signature === expected_action → return true
sign_file → Caller: return { uid, expires, signature, url, read_url, write_url, metadata_url, ... }
Request → configurable_auth: check req.actor already set (PreAuthService short-circuit) → next()
configurable_auth: extract token from [body.auth_token | Authorization header | cookie | query.auth_token | socket.handshake]
configurable_auth: if no token && optional → next(); else APIError 'token_missing'
configurable_auth: on LegacyTokenError + path=='/whoami' → svc_auth.check_session(token, {req, from_upgrade:true})
configurable_auth: set context actor/user, req.actor, req.user, req.token → next()
body_parser_error_handler: if err instanceof SyntaxError && err.status===400 && 'body' in err → res.status(400).send(err)
key_relationships: Backend_AntiCSRFService uses CircularQueue (capacity=10) per user session for token storage
auth2 = configurable_auth({ optional: false }) — thin wrapper
anticsrf_middleware depends_on auth2_middleware (needs req.user.uuid already set)
sign_file produces signatures consumed by validate_signature_auth

method_signatures.GUI_AntiCSRFService.token: async token(): Promise<string>  — GET /get-anticsrf-token with Bearer token
method_signatures.anticsrf: anticsrf(options) => async (req, res, next)  — validates req.body.anti_csrf
method_signatures.configurable_auth: configurable_auth(options) => async (req, res, next)  — options: { optional, allow_cached_user, no_options_auth }
method_signatures.validate_signature_auth: validate_signature_auth(url: string, action: string, options?: { uid? }): boolean | throws
method_signatures.sign_file: async sign_file(fsentry, action): { uid, expires, signature, url, read_url, write_url, metadata_url, ... }
method_signatures.body_parser_error_handler: body_parser_error_handler(err, req, res, next): void  — catches SyntaxError 400

important_notes: CSRF tokens are scoped per user.uuid (not per session), stored in a CircularQueue of 10; oldest token is evicted when capacity exceeded
consume_token is one-time use: token is removed from CircularQueue (maybe_consume), preventing replay
The /get-anticsrf-token endpoint is explicitly blocked on the 'api.' subdomain (more relaxed CORS) to prevent cross-origin token harvest
validate_signature_auth: 'write' signature grants ALL actions (super-permission); action-specific signature only grants that action
Signature secret is config.url_signature_secret; algorithm is sha256
sign_file uses a very large TTL (~317 years), so signatures are effectively permanent unless secret changes
auth2 middleware skips if req.actor is already set (PreAuthService pre-populates it)
LegacyTokenError on /whoami triggers session upgrade: check_session + new cookie + new token
body_parser_error_handler is an Express error-handling middleware (4 args) catching malformed JSON bodies
eggspress is a router factory — anticsrf must be placed in 'mw' array AFTER auth2 since it requires req.user
source_files_analyzed: src/backend/src/helpers.js (validate_signature_auth @ L2131, sign_file @ L1431, body_parser_error_handler @ L1349)
